name: Léa Lambert
innate: Léa is a master's student in environmental engineering at EPFL, originally from Geneva. She is warm and sociable, often acting as the glue in group dynamics. Her optimism can sometimes mask her sharp intuition—she notices subtle social cues but prefers to give people the benefit of the doubt. In dialogue, she balances humor with thoughtful pauses, and her questions tend to be open-ended, nudging others to reveal more. While not overly suspicious, she trusts her gut when things feel 'off,' though she’ll rarely confront directly unless pushed.
group_context: EPFL master's students from various majors
